response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine distributed-systems exposure and a long record of testing craftsmanship, but he misses the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his resume shows roughly seven months of professional C++ work (National Instruments) plus a thesis project, with his depth instead in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. His high-throughput, low-latency work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic is relevant to large-scale infrastructure, but there is no formal technical-leadership or cloud-platform-architecture track record of the kind this Technical Lead role demands.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and authored testing libraries/tooling
Proven mentor and knowledge-sharer through workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Far short of the required 8 years of C++ (~7 months professional C++ experience)
No formal technical-leadership role leading strategy or managing priorities across teams
Limited production cloud-architecture experience; background is product/full-stack rather than compute platforms

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal technical leadership experience
